'''chodamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocabularyclept|vocabularyclept]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocabularyclept|vocabularyclept]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chodamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodamithi|chodamithi]] || [[word:chodamiji|chodamiji]] || [[word:chodamishi|chodamishi]] || [[word:chodamiki|chodamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodamuthuthu|chodamuthuthu]] || [[word:chodamujuju|chodamujuju]] || [[word:chodamushushu|chodamushushu]] || [[word:chodamukuku|chodamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodamuthu|chodamuthu]] || [[word:chodamuju|chodamuju]] || [[word:chodamushu|chodamushu]] || [[word:chodamuku|chodamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodamufthuf|chodamufthuf]] || [[word:chodamufjuf|chodamufjuf]] || [[word:chodamufshuf|chodamufshuf]] || [[word:chodamufkuf|chodamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodamethe|chodamethe]] || [[word:chodameje|chodameje]] || [[word:chodameshe|chodameshe]] || [[word:chodameke|chodameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodamothotho|chodamothotho]] || [[word:chodamojojo|chodamojojo]] || [[word:chodamoshosho|chodamoshosho]] || [[word:chodamokoko|chodamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodamotho|chodamotho]] || [[word:chodamojo|chodamojo]] || [[word:chodamosho|chodamosho]] || [[word:chodamoko|chodamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodamofthof|chodamofthof]] || [[word:chodamofjof|chodamofjof]] || [[word:chodamofshof|chodamofshof]] || [[word:chodamofkof|chodamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodamïfthïf|chodamïfthïf]] || [[word:chodamïfjïf|chodamïfjïf]] || [[word:chodamïfshïf|chodamïfshïf]] || [[word:chodamïfkïf|chodamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodamïfthïfthïf|chodamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chodamïfjïfjïf|chodamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chodamïfshïfshïf|chodamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chodamïfkïfkïf|chodamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodamïfthïf|chodamïfthïf]] || [[word:chodamïfjïf|chodamïfjïf]] || [[word:chodamïfshïf|chodamïfshïf]] || [[word:chodamïfkïf|chodamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodamïfthïf|chodamïfthïf]] || [[word:chodamïfjïf|chodamïfjïf]] || [[word:chodamïfshïf|chodamïfshïf]] || [[word:chodamïfkïf|chodamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodamæthæ|chodamæthæ]] || [[word:chodamæjæ|chodamæjæ]] || [[word:chodamæshæ|chodamæshæ]] || [[word:chodamækæ|chodamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodamathatha|chodamathatha]] || [[word:chodamajaja|chodamajaja]] || [[word:chodamashasha|chodamashasha]] || [[word:chodamakaka|chodamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodamatha|chodamatha]] || [[word:chodamaja|chodamaja]] || [[word:chodamasha|chodamasha]] || [[word:chodamaka|chodamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodamafthaf|chodamafthaf]] || [[word:chodamafjaf|chodamafjaf]] || [[word:chodamafshaf|chodamafshaf]] || [[word:chodamafkaf|chodamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chodamasha|chodamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodamshësha|chodamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodamrosha|chodamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodamusha|chodamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodamyasha|chodamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodamnkshësha|gochodamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodamnkrosha|gochodamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodamnkmusha|gochodamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodamnkyasha|gochodamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chodadamasha|chodadamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodadamshësha|chodadamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodadamrosha|chodadamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodadamusha|chodadamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodadamyasha|chodadamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodadamnkshësha|gochodadamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodadamnkrosha|gochodadamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodadamnkmusha|gochodadamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodadamnkyasha|gochodadamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chedæmasha|chedæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chedæmshësha|chedæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chedæmrosha|chedæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chedæmusha|chedæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chedæmyasha|chedæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochedæmnkshësha|gochedæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochedæmnkrosha|gochedæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochedæmnkmusha|gochedæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochedæmnkyasha|gochedæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chodfamasha|chodfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodfamshësha|chodfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodfamrosha|chodfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodfamusha|chodfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodfamyasha|chodfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodfamnkshësha|gochodfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodfamnkrosha|gochodfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodfamnkmusha|gochodfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodfamnkyasha|gochodfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
